zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Lovell於1375年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒時，他的父親Sir John Lovel, KN, KG35歲，母親Maud de Holand20歲。他與Eleanor la Zouche在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1414年10月19日在他的家鄉享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Lovell于1375年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒时，他的父亲Sir John Lovel, KN, KG35岁，母亲Maud de Holand20岁。他与Eleanor la Zouche在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1414年10月19日在他的家乡享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lovell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

variants.name: Lowell
meanings: English: variant of Lovell , derived from Anglo-Norman Frenchlou ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -el.

History: Lowell is the surname of one of America's most distinguished NewEngland families, which have been prominent for over 200 years. Itsfounder, John Lowell (1743–1802), was a legislator and judge. Thecity of Lowell, MA was named in honor of his son Francis Cabot Lowell(1775–1817), a textile manufacturer.

variants.name: Love
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name derived from the Old English female name Lufu ‘love’, or the masculine equivalent Lufa. Compare Leaf 2.

English and Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French love ‘she-wolf’ or simply ‘wolf’, the word love being a back-formation from the diminutive forms lovel and lovet ‘little wolf’. See also Low 3, from Anglo-Norman French lou, the more usual form of the word.
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin (see McKinnon ).

variants.name: Loveall
meanings: English: presumably a variant of   Lovell  , or possibly a habitational name from Lovehall in Tayside.

variants.name: Lovewell
meanings: English (mainly Norfolk): from Middle English love ‘love’ (Old English lufian ‘to love’) + wel ‘well’ (Old English wel), presumably denoting a lover or philanderer. There may have been some confusion with Lovell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Lovell was born in 1375, in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Lovel, KN, KG, was 35 and his mother, Maud de Holand, was 20. He married Eleanor la Zouche in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 October 1414, in his hometown, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Lovell est né en 1375, à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Lovel, KN, KG, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Maud de Holand, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor la Zouche à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 octobre 1414, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Lovell 1375 in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Lovel, KN, KG 35 und seine Mutter Maud de Holand 20. Er hat in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor la Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Oktober 1414 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Lovell è nato il nel 1375 nel Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Lovel, KN, KG, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Holand, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor la Zouche nel Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 ottobre 1414, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Lovellが1375年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュで生まれた時，父Sir John Lovel, KN, KGは35歳，母Maud de Holandは20歳であった。イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュでEleanor la Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1414年10月19日に故郷で39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Lovell(이)가 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Lovel, KN, KG(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Holand(은)는 20세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에서 Eleanor la Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1414년 10월 19일 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Lovell nasceu em 1375, em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Lovel, KN, KG, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Holand, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor la Zouche em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1414, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Lovell родился в 1375 г. в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Lovel, KN, KG было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Holand, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor la Zouche в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 октября 1414 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Lovell nació en 1375, en Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Lovel, KN, KG, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Maud de Holand, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Eleanor la Zouche en Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1414, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años.
